creator: giw@edit.ne.jp
text:
This port and also pkg still have postfixadmin issue #553
https://github.com/postfixadmin/postfixadmin/issues/553
https://github.com/postfixadmin/postfixadmin/commit/5a8f334b4536013fdde44cf5ee3aee02ea91540e
Will it be merged near future?

This issue is only affected who is using with MySQL.

Best regards,
